cta.label: READY FOR YOUR MOROCCAN ADVENTURE?
cta.title: A step of sand, sea and souk awaits you.
footer.slogan: Your partner to discover Morocco differently.
explore.label: Discover Morocco
explore.title: Explore Morocco Differently
explore.desc: From imperial cities to desert landscapes, discover the places, flavors and traditions that make Morocco unforgettable.
city.marrakech_desc: The Red City, former capital of Morocco. The UNESCO-listed medina, Djemaa El-Fna, labyrinthine souks, luxurious riads and historic palaces make it Morocco's flagship tourist destination. Must-see: Majorelle Gardens, Bahia Palace and the artisan souks.
city.fes_desc: Spiritual and cultural capital of Morocco. Fès El-Bali is the world's largest medieval medina, entirely pedestrian. The Chouara tanneries, Qarawiyyin mosque (world's oldest university, founded in 859 AD), madrasas and fondouks make it a truly unique city.
city.chef_desc: The legendary Blue City, nestled in the Rif mountains. All its alleys are painted in shades of blue and white. A peaceful haven ideal for hiking, photography and discovering local craftsmanship. A unique atmosphere, far from the crowds of major cities.
city.merzouga_desc: The golden dunes of Erg Chebbi reach 150 meters in height — among the tallest in the Sahara. A night in a Berber bivouac under the stars, a camel ride at sunset, sunrise over golden dunes. A timeless, absolutely unforgettable experience.
city.essaouira_desc: The City of Trade Winds — a historic fishing port with 16th-century Portuguese ramparts. World capital of windsurfing and kitesurfing thanks to its constant winds. UNESCO-listed medina, art galleries, hippie-chic vibes and the famous Gnaoua Festival every June.
city.ouarzazate_desc: The "Hollywood of Africa" houses the largest film studios in Africa — Gladiator, Lawrence of Arabia, Game of Thrones were filmed here. The ideal gateway to visit UNESCO Aït Benhaddou, the Drâa Valley and the kasbahs of southern Morocco.
explore_cta.label: READY TO FIND THE PERFECT TIME?
explore_cta.title: Choose your ideal season, from spring in the Atlas to the soft lights of Moroccan winter.
culture.label: Culture & Customs
culture.title: Understand & Respect Morocco
culture.desc: A few cultural keys to travel with meaning, openness and kindness.
culture.religion_desc: Respect sacred places and dress modestly.
culture.hosp_desc: Tea and warm welcomes are part of the experience.
culture.ramadan_desc: A time when the city comes alive in the evening.
culture_cta.label: READY TO DISCOVER THE SOUL OF MOROCCO?
culture_cta.title: Understand Morocco beyond its landscapes, through its traditions, hospitality and everyday gestures.
gastro.label: GASTRONOMY · MOROCCO
gastro.title: Taste Morocco
gastro.desc: A journey isn't told only with the eyes. In Morocco, it's tasted — in the steam of a tajine, the sugar of tea poured from high, the scent of a spice souk. Here is the flavor itinerary.
gastro.cuisine_title: Here, eating isn't a stop on the trip — it is the trip. Every region has its table, every family its recipe, every hour its ritual.
gastro.feat1_desc: Tajines and tangias simmered for hours.
gastro.feat3_desc: One dish, in the center, for everyone.
gastro.plats_title: Four tables that tell the story of a country
gastro.tajine_desc: The iconic dish, simmered for hours in its clay cone: lemon-olive chicken, lamb with prunes, seasonal vegetables.
gastro.couscous_desc: Hand-rolled semolina, saffron broth, stacked vegetables — the ultimate sharing meal.
gastro.pastilla_desc: The sweet-savory pastry for special occasions: pigeon or chicken, toasted almonds, cinnamon and powdered sugar.
gastro.harira_desc: The soup that opens ftour: tomato, lentils, chickpeas and herbs, served with dates and chebakia.
gastro_cta.label: READY TO TASTE MOROCCO?
gastro_cta.title: Build your itinerary around flavors, from the deep south to the northern medinas.
when.label: WHEN TO VISIT
when.title: There is no bad season to discover Morocco
when.tip_spring: In spring, we recommend the Atlas foothills and the Ourika valley, when everything is in bloom.
when.tip_summer: In summer, we recommend breezy days in Essaouira and cool hikes in the Atlas highlands.
when.tip_autumn: In autumn, head to the Sahara and the imperial cities — mild days, calm and golden light.
when.tip_winter: In winter, Marrakech, the desert and southern Morocco offer a calm, warm and very pleasant atmosphere.
when.spring_text: Blooming valleys, lush Atlas landscapes and pleasant weather in the cities.
when.summer_text: Enjoy the cool Atlantic coast or explore the High Atlas mountains.
when.autumn_text: The best time for the desert: mild days, stunning light and fewer crowds.
when.winter_text: Starry nights in the Sahara and snow-capped peaks in the Moroccan mountains.
when_cta.label: READY TO EXPLORE THE CITIES OF MOROCCO?
when_cta.title: Every city in Morocco reveals a different side of the country: vibrant medinas, golden kasbahs, blue villages, Atlantic beaches and desert gateways.

pkg.label: TOURS & PACKAGES
pkg.title: Explore Morocco at your own pace
pkg.desc: From day trips to multi-day circuits, discover the cities, waterfalls, mountains and desert through carefully organized experiences.
pkg.sel_desc: A selection of circuits loved by our travelers to discover the most beautiful sides of Morocco.
pkg.tour1_desc: An immersion between medina, lively squares, gardens and natural landscapes around Marrakech.
pkg.tour2_desc: Golden dunes, camel ride, bivouac and a night under the stars in the heart of Merzouga.
pkg.tour3_desc: A getaway to the blue city, between quiet alleys, authentic medina and Rif mountains.
pkg.tour4_desc: A cultural circuit between Morocco's great historic cities, their medinas, monuments and traditions.
pkg.cat_desc: Choose a category to quickly discover the circuits, cities and experiences available for your travel style.
pkg.c1_desc: A nature day between Atlas mountains, Berber villages and river.
pkg.c2_desc: Jamaa El Fna, souks, Majorelle Garden and discovery of the red city.
pkg.c3_desc: An excursion to Morocco's most beautiful waterfalls with walk and panorama.
pkg.c4_desc: Southern route, Erg Chebbi dunes, camel ride and bivouac night.
pkg.c5_desc: Ancient medina, tanneries, traditional souks and cultural heritage.
pkg.c6_desc: A getaway to the blue city, between quiet alleys and Rif mountains.
pkg.c7_desc: Medina, port, ramparts, beach and artistic vibes by the ocean.
pkg.c8_desc: Casablanca, Rabat, Fès, Marrakech and Sahara in a complete circuit.
pkg.step1_desc: You select the city or circuit you want to discover.
pkg.step2_desc: We adjust stops, duration and pace according to your wishes.
pkg.step3_desc: Your driver or guide accompanies you with a clear itinerary.
pkg.step4_desc: You discover Morocco stress-free, with simple and smooth organization.

about.label: ABOUT
about.title: The people behind the journey
about.desc: A passionate local team, ready to create authentic, comfortable and memorable Moroccan experiences.
about.story_title: Born from a love for the road
about.story_desc1: Azul Travel was born from a simple desire: to show Morocco differently. From vibrant medinas to Sahara dunes, we design custom, human and well-organized journeys.
about.story_desc2: Our strength comes from our knowledge of the terrain, our local partners and our attention to the small details that make each trip unique.
about.story_note: Every itinerary is carefully prepared, keeping the comfort, authenticity and pace of each traveler.
